title: table-branch-activation-slice troubleshooting sidecar
goal: Draft the troubleshooting.md page for the new table-branch-activation-slice skill.
scope: Capture recurring failure cases for bounded parser branch activation.
Prefer structural and observable issues over one-off noise.
Keep the guidance tied to stop conditions and safe fallback.
non_goals: Do not edit runtime.md or any other sidecar.
Do not patch repeated-issue KB files directly.
done_definition: at least four realistic failure patterns are covered
each pattern includes a concrete action or fallback
required_checks: Keep write scope to owned_paths only
Use current workspace failure patterns when possible
Do not invent unsupported backend behavior
